error_signature: Cannot connect to Supabase PostgreSQL database
title: Connection issue with Supabase PostgreSQL in n8n
symptom: Users are unable to connect n8n to their Supabase PostgreSQL database, receiving errors during connection attempts.
applies_when: Configured with connection string or manual settings
not_this_if: Connection works with other PostgreSQL databases
root_cause: The connection issues often arise from incorrect configuration details such as the host, port, or credentials. Supabase may also use a non-standard port, which can lead to connection failures if not properly set.
fix_steps: Ensure the host is correctly set to the Supabase provided host without any extra characters.
Verify that the port is set to the one provided by Supabase, not the default PostgreSQL port.
Enter the database name, username, and password as specified in the Supabase settings.
Test the connection to ensure it is successful.
agent_instruction: Double-check the connection settings for the Supabase PostgreSQL database in n8n and ensure all details are correct.
